name: @intentsolutionsio/secrets-manager-integrator
description: Integrate with secrets managers (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, etc)

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install secrets-manager-integrator\\n  or /plugin install secrets-manager-integrator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
